name: Box
description: Sync files and folders from Box cloud storage into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: Box App Client ID
install_fields.help: From Box Developer Console → My Apps → Your App → OAuth 2.0 Credentials → Client ID

install_fields.label: Box App Client Secret
install_fields.help: The client secret from your Box Developer app OAuth 2.0 Credentials

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: Must match exactly what is registered in your Box app Redirect URIs

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates client_id and client_secret and marks the connector as installed. Call before OAuth authorization.

apis.name: Authorize (OAuth Code Exchange)
apis.description: Returns the Box OAuth2 authorization URL, or exchanges an authorization code for access and refresh tokens.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Box API connectivity by fetching the current user (GET /users/me).

apis.name: Sync Files
apis.description: Syncs all files recursively from the Box root folder into the Shielva knowledge base using BFS folder traversal.

apis.name: List Folder
apis.description: Lists items in a Box folder by folder_id. Defaults to root (folder_id='0').

apis.name: Get File
apis.description: Fetches metadata for a single Box file by file_id.

apis.name: Get Folder
apis.description: Fetches metadata for a single Box folder by folder_id.

apis.name: Search
apis.description: Searches Box for files and folders matching a query string.
